name: Write & critique
intent: Write a piece, then critique it against the actual output — a worked example of chaining two skills into one flow.

steps.instruction: Write the piece the user's intent asks for. If no specifics were given, produce a short, vivid example of this skill's best work.
Critique the previous step's output in 2-3 sharp, constructive sentences, then grade it A–F with one line of justification.
steps.produces: a 2-3 sentence critique + an A–F grade
